name: Magigoo Original — 50 ml adhesive pen
notes: Works with PLA, PETG, ABS, ASA, HIPS, TPU on PEI or glass. Hot-stick, cold-release. Use on P2S smooth or textured PEI for stubborn PLA/PETG when the plate alone underadheres.

name: Magigoo Pro PA — 50 ml adhesive pen (Nylon/PA)
notes: Specifically formulated for PA6-CF, PA6-GF, PAHT-CF, PPA-CF — materials that warp heavily without adhesion aid. Use on Engineering Plate with P2S sealed-chamber mode. NL price ~€23.85 incl. BTW.

name: Magigoo Pro PC — 50 ml adhesive pen (Polycarbonate)
notes: PC is prone to delamination and cracking. Apply thin layer on Engineering Plate, print with sealed chamber. NL price ~€23.85 incl. BTW.

name: Pritt Stick (or generic PVA glue stick) — 43 g
notes: Budget adhesion layer and plate release aid (especially for PETG — prevents it bonding too strongly to PEI). Also doubles as Z-offset shim for textured plate. Available in any Dutch office/supermarket.

name: 3DLAC Adhesion Spray — 400 ml
notes: Alternative to glue stick for ABS/ASA/PETG. Apply thin coat from 30 cm distance to avoid pooling. Easy water cleanup. Available from 3DJake NL.

name: Rechargeable Silica Gel Desiccant — 200 g (colour-changing)
notes: For storage boxes / vacuum bags. Orange/blue indicator turns green/pink when saturated. Recharge at 120 °C in oven for 1–2 h. Use in combination with vacuum bags for long-term spool storage.

name: Rechargeable Silica Gel Desiccant — 500 g (colour-changing)
notes: Larger format for AMS 2 Pro supplemental storage or storage boxes holding multiple spools. Same recharge procedure as 200 g variant.

name: Sunlu FilaDryer S4 — 4-spool filament dryer
notes: Dries 4 x 1 kg spools simultaneously up to 70 °C with ±3 °C uniformity. Useful for PA/PC/PETG-CF pre-print drying without monopolising the AMS 2 Pro drying cycle. EU price ~€126. Available from 3DJake NL and ec3d.nl.

name: Vacuum Storage Bags — spool size, with hand pump
notes: Airtight long-term spool storage. Pair with rechargeable desiccant pouch inside bag. Look for 30×40 cm or larger bags to fit standard 1 kg spools. Widely available via Amazon NL.

name: Isopropanol (IPA) 99% — 500 ml
notes: For cleaning build plate (removes oils/release agents before printing ABS/PC/PA). Also for wiping X-axis rods before lubrication and lens cleaning. Use lint-free cloth. DO NOT use on silicone sock or PTFE tubes.

name: Lint-free microfibre cleaning cloths — 30-pack
notes: For IPA wipe-downs of build plate, camera lens, X-axis rods, toolhead. Avoid paper towels — fibres contaminate PEI coating. Available at most Dutch supermarkets or via Amazon NL.

name: Brass-bristle nozzle cleaning brush — pack of 5
notes: For clearing burnt residue from nozzle exterior (NOT for inside the nozzle — use cold pull for that). Brass is soft enough not to damage hardened steel nozzle surface. Use at printing temp (200–220 °C for PLA).

name: Nozzle unclog acupuncture needles — 0.4 mm (50-pack)
notes: 0.4 mm diameter stainless needles for clearing partial clogs. Insert while hot (200 °C+). P2S includes 1 unclogging pin in toolbox; needles are thinner and better for stubborn partial blockages. Also useful at 0.35 mm for 0.2 mm nozzles — verify needle diameter before ordering.

name: Capricorn XS Premium PTFE Bowden Tube — 1 m (1.9 mm ID / 4 mm OD)
notes: High-quality low-friction PTFE for external spool-to-buffer routing on P2S. Inner diameter 1.9 mm (tighter tolerance than generic 2 mm = less filament wobble). Cut to required lengths: 600 mm (AMS to buffer), 350 mm (upper-left rear), 280 mm (lower-left), 180 mm (right rear). SKU at 3DJake: CC-XS-175-2.

name: Super Lube Synthetic Grease with PTFE — 85 g tube
notes: NLGI 2 synthetic grease for Z-axis lead screws when Bambu OEM grease is unavailable. PTFE additive reduces friction. Do NOT use on rods/rails — oil only for those. Widely used in 3D printing community as a Bambu OEM substitute.

name: Cotton swabs (Q-tips) — 200-pack
notes: For camera lens cleaning (VOC buildup causes blurry remote view; clean every 6 months), applying IPA to tight spaces, and cleaning the purge chute area. Available at any Dutch drugstore or supermarket.
